summary: Comprehensive testing of Football Prediction Platform v2.0 completed. Backend APIs working excellently with all 9 prediction markets functional. Frontend UI fully operational with accordion sections, league filtering, and value bets display.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error when filtering by confidence parameter
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - main value bets functionality works, only confidence filter fails

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with Daily Predictions header and today's date
API-Football Not Configured notice displays correctly
Stats cards show matches today (12), value bets (37), avg edge (6.8%), model accuracy (54.2%)
League filter buttons work (All Leagues, Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Ligue 1, Bundesliga)
Match prediction cards display with accordion sections (10 cards found)
Accordion for Full-Time Winner (1X2) expands and shows probabilities
Accordion for Half-Time Winner expands correctly
Accordion for Half-Time Over/Under shows HT goals markets
Accordion for Goals Over/Under shows 0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5 lines
Accordion for BTTS shows Yes/No probabilities
Accordion for Asian Handicap shows handicap line and covers
Accordion for HT/FT shows 9 combinations
Accordion for Correct Score shows top scores
Accordion for Specials shows clean sheets, win to nil, etc.
Value bets section displays with edge and Kelly stakes (10 value bets with 391.21% total edge)
API endpoint /api/daily-predictions returns all 9 markets
API endpoint /api/daily-matches returns today's fixtures (12 matches)
API endpoint /api/value-bets returns identified value bets
Refresh button triggers prediction update
All market-specific endpoints working (ft_win, ht_win, goals, btts, asian_handicap)
Dashboard stats endpoint working with all required fields
Health and admin endpoints functional
Match detail and AI analysis endpoints working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor backend bug: value bets confidence filter endpoint returning 500 error. All other functionality working perfectly.
